name: Fruit Selector
description: Select a fruit from a dropdown.
python_code:
from src.nodes.base import BaseNode

class FruitSelectorNode(BaseNode):
    name = "Fruit Selector"
    
    def __init__(self):
        super().__init__()
        # [AUTO-GENERATED-PORTS-START]
        self.add_input("choice", "string", widget_type="dropdown", options=['Apple', 'Banana', 'Cherry', 'Date'])
        self.add_output("selected", "string")
        # [AUTO-GENERATED-PORTS-END]
        
    async def execute(self, inputs):
        choice = inputs.get("choice", "Apple")
        return {"selected": choice}

def register_node():
    return FruitSelectorNode
